allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('brief OK, items:', d['item_count']\)" kill %1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('positions:', d.get\('position_count'\), '| total_value:', d.get\('total_value'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('items:', d['item_count'], '| market:', list\(d['market_summary'].keys\(\)\)\)")
